title: Creamy Showoff Mediterranean Cauliflower Stir-fry
description: A herbal and creamy show-off mediterranean dish featuring cauliflower and dairy-free-friendly ingredients.

ingredients.name: 1/4 cup nutritional yeast
ingredients.notes: Optional for extra creaminess and umami flavor.

ingredients.name: 1 tbsp chopped fresh herbs (thyme, parsley, oregano)
200ml vegan milk or almond milk
ingredients.notes: Any plant-based milk can be used for creamy consistency.

instructions: Toss cauliflower florets with olive oil, salt and pepper on a baking sheet. Roast for about 30 minutes or until golden brown.
While cauliflower roasts, heat olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat. Add red onion and garlic; sauté for about 5 minutes or until softened.
Add roasted cauliflower to the skillet with onions. Pour in lemon juice and nutritional yeast (if using). Stir well to combine all ingredients.
Reduce heat to low, add vegan milk or almond milk. Simmer mixture for a few more minutes to thicken sauce.
Stir in fresh herbs and seasonings. Cook until liquid is absorbed into the cauliflower.
Serve hot as a side dish with your favorite grains or over quinoa.
